creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Erik Jensen from comment #0)

> Most of the port's patching of the source code is no longer needed, 
> thanks to the amazing work carried out by mkrzewic at github.
> His work is now part of the actual source code.

Nice work!

> If you could test what is missing in pkg-plist on arm64 that would
> be great.

Still waiting on rpi4 build results...

Committed, thanks!
